name: SOL Historical Backfill Dataset
scope: Research Lab data-engineering dataset only. Creates a separate SOLUSDT historical snapshot under research_lab/snapshots. No strategy test, runtime change, PAPER deployment, LIVE deployment, or production DB write.
edge_rationale: SOL_HISTORICAL_BACKFILL_PILOT_V1 proved ingestion mechanics and storage slope. Before testing frozen trial-00095 transfer on SOL, the project needs a complete audited SOLUSDT historical dataset comparable to BTC and ETH research snapshots.
counterparty_or_market_mechanism: No trading edge is tested. The milestone validates whether SOLUSDT 2022-2026 historical archives can be materialized into deterministic research tables with resumable checkpoints.
required_data: SOLUSDT daily metrics ZIPs for open interest
SOLUSDT daily aggTrades ZIPs aggregated to 60s and 15m buckets
frozen_assumptions: Do not mutate BTC, ETH, production, PAPER, LIVE, runtime, or storage databases.
Raw ZIP archives are streamed per day and discarded after parsing.
Daily checkpoints must allow resumable restart without redownloading DONE days.
SOL strategy transfer backtest is out of scope until this dataset is complete and audited.
SOL shadow or PAPER runtime is out of scope.
expected_observation: A successful run creates a complete SOLUSDT 2022-2026 research snapshot with explicit daily checkpoints, low missing rates, zero duplicate groups, zero OHLC errors, and no failed days.

kill_criteria.unsafe_path: Writing outside research_lab/snapshots invalidates the milestone.
kill_criteria.production_db_write: Any write to storage/btc_bot.db or production database invalidates the milestone.
kill_criteria.missingness: More than 1% missingness in required dataset tables blocks SOL transfer research.
kill_criteria.quality_errors: OHLC violations, duplicates, or failed archive days require fix before transfer research.
kill_criteria.runtime_change: Any runtime/core/settings/execution change invalidates the milestone.

failure_modes: SOL aggTrades archives have unexpected missing days despite pilot success.
Funding REST history has older range gaps.
Metrics archive schema changes across years.
Interrupted run leaves RUNNING checkpoints that must be retried safely.
Dataset quality passes overall but specific event periods have concentrated gaps.
out_of_scope: Changing runtime, PAPER, LIVE, core, orchestrator, risk, or execution behavior
author: Codex
